end_ship.title: Locate an End Ship attached to an End City

elytra.title: Retrieve the Elytra from the End Ship's item frame

subtitle.text: The previous civilization built ships. This is what they left behind on the last one.

description: End Cities are towers of purpur blocks and End Rods.
Some End Cities have an End Ship floating beside them.
The ship contains a levitation potion, two chests of loot, and a single Elytra in an item frame.
The Elytra is the defining movement upgrade of the late game.
Combined with firework rockets, it enables sustained flight across any terrain.
In the End's outer islands, it is essential — the islands are separated by void.
- Use ender pearls to bridge to it
- Or build with blocks you've collected
- The levitation potion inside can also boost you if you're careful
You have been walking and climbing since Ch01.
